response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and possesses strong entrepreneurial and full-stack building skills, their profile lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory experience required for a Director-level Principal role. The candidate's AI exposure is very recent, and their background aligns more with a hands-on generalist Staff Engineer than a specialized AI strategist.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background as a founder and open-source contributor
Hands-on builder fluency across multiple stacks and cloud tools
concerns: AI/ML experience is very recent and lacks recognized depth
No evidence of Director-level enterprise advisory or strategy formulation
Seniority aligns more with Staff than Principal/Director-level
